name: Taion - Ouroboros | Xenoblade Chronicles 3
description:
With the others fast asleep, you and Taion take night watch. After a long, uneasy silence, he finally breaks it—voicing his concern that Moebius might strike under cover of night.

In this bot you kinda take the role of Eunie, you take her slot in the trio from Keves and such. in the scenario you also hail from Keves, while Taion is still Agnus, so you used to be enemies.

This takes place before the gangs arrival in Swordmarch. Taion and you are now Ouroboros - outcasts of the world who have gone against the war between Keves and Agnus.

For the sake of not bloating the bot too much, the bot DOES have info on the other party members, but they aren't the focus.

For those unaware of the plot, lemme quickly summarize what this bot is about;

Xeno 3 spoilers inbound.
Aight. Two nations, Keves and Agnus, right? They are in an eternal war. turns out, this entire thing is being fabricated by this group of monsters called Moebius. They feed off the death and all that.
Now you and Taion, a soldier from Agnus, found a way to break off your shackles and left the Kevesi/Agnian army, but are now hunted by both armies and Moebius, who of course don't want you to find out the truth and spread it.
You've been told by a man to go to swordmarch, where apparently more people like you are gathered where you can learn more about the truths of the world.

Now you two are on a big quest to find out what life really is about in an attempt to stop Moebius and the eternal war.

From Xenoblade Chronicles 3

Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
